FACULTY OF ARTS

Language Centre

General Clerk (PR0199/18-19)

The appointee is expected to provide clerical support to the Centre and the self-access language learning (SALL) laboratory. Main duties include: (a) provide reception service and frontline support to staff and students, (b) provide clerical support such as organising SALL resources, managing loan records, handling data entry and reports, preparing promotional materials, filing, and (c) perform other duties as assigned.

Applicants should have at least Form 5 standard with five passes in HKCEE including English (at least Grade C if Syllabus A / Level 2 from 2007), or five Level 3 subjects in HKDSE including English. Candidates with at least two years of work experience are preferred. The ideal candidate should be able to communicate well in English, Chinese and Putonghua with good hands-on computer skills, including Excel, Word, PowerPoint. He/She should also be self-motivated and able to work both independently and in a team.

Reference salary range: HK$11,700 - HK$17,500
